messages.adminSms: HOT LEAD ALERT! {{firstName}} {{lastName}} from {{company}} just submitted a request on the {{brandName}} site. Phone: {{phone}}. Email: {{email}}.

leadSms.inHours: Hey {{firstName}}, just got your submission on the {{brandName}} site. I'm on a call with another client right now but I'll call you right after. {{repName}}
leadSms.afterHours: Hey {{firstName}}, got your submission on the {{brandName}} site. We're wrapped up for today but I'll reach out first thing next business day. {{repName}}
